en: You cannot argue the point right now.
ko: 지금은 그 점에 대해 논쟁할 수 없습니다.

en: Twelve in a row, and making a joke out of the American League.
He throws to first, and that's the sound of 14 straight victories.
Fourteen straight, the longest run of the bigs this year.
It has slingshot the A's into first in the AL West.
ko: 이로 인해 A's가 AL 서부 1위로 올라섰습니다.
그렇지 않다면 어떻게 설명할 수 있겠습니까?

en: How do you explain otherwise some of the victories that they've come up with?
ko: 그들이 이룬 몇몇 승리를 어떻게 설명할 수 있겠습니까?

en: The Oakland A's are going to win 16 consecutive games.
This is the longest win streak in baseball, folks, in 25 years.
The A's have won 16 in a row.
We're going to 20! We're going to 20!
Well, to have a winning streak of anything like this duration, you have to be good.
ko: 이렇게 긴 연승을 하려면 잘해야 합니다.

en: But there's an element of randomness to it.
The 1927 Yankees, Ruth, Gehrig, Murderers Row, some people still say the best team ever.
ko: 1927년 양키스, 루스, 게리그, 머더러스 로우, 여전히 최고의 팀이라고 말하는 사람도 있습니다.

en: Longest winning streak for them that year? Nine.
ko: 그 해 그들의 가장 긴 연승은? 9연승입니다.

en: You guys try to analyze it from a numbers standpoint.
And I'm telling you, there is no explanation for what's going on.
ko: 하지만 제가 말씀드리지만, 지금 일어나고 있는 일에 대한 설명은 없습니다.
